findings.title: Active transition prompt has no input artifact references
findings.details: The next skill should not have to infer its inputs from chat history.
findings.recommended_action: List concrete input artifact paths in the input section.

findings.title: Scope transition prompt misses required input artifacts
findings.details: Scope transition prompts must list the concrete source/scope handoff artifacts that the next skill must read.
findings.recommended_action: Add resolving references to the missing artifacts in the prompt input section, or keep the workflow blocked instead of routing to writer/iteration.

findings.title: Active transition prompt misses required sections
findings.details: The active handoff prompt must state the stage goal, resolving inputs, and guardrails.
findings.recommended_action: Add canonical or accepted alias sections for goal, inputs, and guardrails.

findings.title: negative-oracle-inventory.md is incomplete
findings.details: Scope-level oracle inventories must use the canonical columns and every `candidate_tc_required` row must use `oracle_status = ui-calibration-required`; `gap_required` / `clarification_required` rows must link a real GAP-*.
evidence: negative-oracle-inventory.md:missing columns analyst_question, calibration_notes, decision, field_or_block, handoff_rule, observable_oracle_found, oracle_source, planned_tc_or_gap
findings.recommended_action: Rewrite `negative-oracle-inventory.md` using the canonical reference format.

findings.title: Decision log misses Decision Log section
findings.details: agent-decision-log.md must contain a `## Decision Log` table with observable intermediate decisions, not hidden chain-of-thought.

findings.title: Session log misses required audit sections
findings.details: A stage session log should capture inputs read, inputs intentionally not used, key decisions, risks/fallbacks, validation and contamination check.
findings.recommended_action: Rewrite the session log using references/agent/session-log-format.md.

findings.title: Active source extraction has quality risk
findings.details: Most sections were inferred from heading styles without numeric section ids.
findings.recommended_action: Inspect source extraction before relying on downstream test cases.

findings.title: Active source extraction has quality risk
findings.details: No numeric section ids were detected; section filtering may be unreliable.
findings.recommended_action: Inspect source extraction before relying on downstream test cases.

findings.title: Active source extraction has quality risk
findings.details: Some source blocks are larger than max_chars and require defensive splitting.
findings.recommended_action: Inspect source extraction before relying on downstream test cases.

checks.name: source-selection-xhtml-section
checks.details: Mandatory XHTML source section is present.

checks.name: workflow-state-source-selection-selected
checks.details: Source selection status does not block routing.

checks.name: scope-analyzer-missing-requiredness-oracle-inventory
checks.details: requiredness-oracle-inventory.md not required by scope signals.

checks.name: workflow-state-scope-gap-review-handoff-artifacts
checks.details: Required scope gap review artifacts resolve.

checks.name: workflow-state-scope-gap-review-source-row-inventory
checks.details: Row-level source inventory handoff is present or not required.

checks.name: workflow-state-session-log-kind
checks.details: Workflow state links a same-stage session log.

checks.name: source-support-duplicate-manifest
checks.details: Duplicate source/support files are covered by artifact manifest or absent.

checks.name: oracle-candidate-obligation-coverage
checks.details: Candidate TC coverage is deferred until a test-case output exists; oracle inventory planning is validated separately.

checks.name: coverage-gap-inventory
checks.details: Coverage gap inventory section not present.

checks.name: active-text-encoding-damage
checks.details: Active text artifact has no encoding damage markers.
